food: Leafy green vegetables (spinach, kale, methi, palak)
mechanism: Green vegetables are rich in Vitamin K, which directly opposes Warfarin's blood-thinning effect
effect: Warfarin becomes less effective, increasing clot risk
action: Keep green vegetable intake consistent — do not suddenly increase or decrease. Monitor INR more frequently if diet changes.
hindi_food: पालक, मेथी, सरसों के पत्ते (हरी सब्जियां)

food: Ginger and garlic in large amounts
mechanism: High-dose ginger/garlic have antiplatelet properties that add to Warfarin's effect
action: Moderate dietary use is fine. Avoid high-dose ginger/garlic supplements.

mechanism: Grapefruit inhibits CYP3A4 enzyme that breaks down Atorvastatin, causing 2-5x higher blood levels
effect: Statin toxicity — severe muscle breakdown (rhabdomyolysis) and kidney damage
action: Avoid grapefruit and grapefruit juice completely while on Atorvastatin.

mechanism: CYP3A4 inhibition raises Simvastatin levels dramatically
effect: High risk of myopathy and rhabdomyolysis
action: Avoid grapefruit entirely. Switch to Rosuvastatin if grapefruit cannot be avoided.

mechanism: Soy and fiber bind to Levothyroxine in the gut, reducing absorption
effect: Less thyroid hormone absorbed, undertreated hypothyroidism
action: Take Levothyroxine 30-60 minutes before any food, including tea or coffee. Separate soy by 4 hours.
hindi_food: सोया दूध, टोफू, और उच्च फाइबर खाद्य पदार्थ

mechanism: Tannins and calcium in tea/coffee/milk reduce Levothyroxine absorption
action: Take Levothyroxine with plain water only. Wait 30 minutes before morning tea/coffee.

mechanism: Alcohol impairs lactic acid metabolism. With Metformin, this dramatically increases lactic acidosis risk
effect: Lactic acidosis — a medical emergency with high mortality
action: Avoid alcohol completely while taking Metformin.

mechanism: Alcohol enhances sulfonylurea insulin release and also impairs gluconeogenesis
effect: Severe prolonged hypoglycemia (dangerously low blood sugar)
action: Avoid alcohol on Glibenclamide. Carry glucose tablets always.

mechanism: Same as Glibenclamide — alcohol potentiates hypoglycemic effect
action: Avoid alcohol. Monitor blood glucose closely.

mechanism: Calcium chelates with Ciprofloxacin in the gut, forming an insoluble complex
effect: Antibiotic absorption reduced by 30-40%, possible treatment failure
action: Take Ciprofloxacin 2 hours before or 6 hours after dairy products.

mechanism: Both damage gastric mucosa. Alcohol also mildly prolongs bleeding time
effect: Increased risk of stomach bleeding and ulcers
action: Avoid alcohol with Aspirin. If unavoidable, use stomach-protection medicine (PPI).

mechanism: Both are gastrointestinal irritants and increase GI bleeding risk synergistically
effect: High risk of gastric ulcer and GI hemorrhage

mechanism: Corticosteroids cause sodium and water retention; high salt diet worsens this
action: Reduce dietary salt intake while on steroids. Eat less pickles, papad, processed foods.
hindi_food: नमकीन खाना, अचार, पापड़, प्रसंस्कृत भोजन

mechanism: ACE inhibitors elevate potassium; high dietary potassium adds to this risk
effect: Dangerous hyperkalemia (high potassium) causing cardiac rhythm issues
action: Monitor potassium levels. Moderate — do not overload on banana, coconut water, potatoes.
hindi_food: केला, आलू, नारियल पानी (बड़ी मात्रा में)

mechanism: ARBs elevate potassium. Excess dietary potassium with ARBs can cause hyperkalemia
effect: Heart rhythm disturbances from high potassium
action: Avoid potassium supplements. Moderate banana and coconut water intake.

mechanism: Both are CNS depressants. Combined they cause severe respiratory depression
effect: Potentially fatal — extreme sedation, respiratory arrest
action: Never drink alcohol while taking any benzodiazepine.

mechanism: Grapefruit inhibits CYP3A4, raising Amlodipine levels
effect: Excessive blood pressure lowering, dizziness, swollen ankles
action: Avoid grapefruit juice. Eat regular fruits instead.
